URI.DefaultScheme TYPE: string/null DEFAULT: 'http' --DESCRIPTION-- <p> Defines through what scheme the output will be served, in order to select the proper object validator when no scheme information is present. </p> <p> Starting with HTML Purifier 4.9.0, the default scheme can be null, in which case we reject all URIs which do not have explicit schemes. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
